name: chr1_1q41_subtelomeric_DISP1
description: 1q41 region with flanking segmental duplications around DISP1, TP53BP2 and FBXO28. Recurrent 1q41-q42 microdeletions cause a Fryns-syndrome-like phenotype; breakpoints lie in the flanking SD cluster.

architecture.internal_structure: Flanking SDs of 20-80 kb at ~95% identity; intervening unique region contains DISP1, TP53BP2, FBXO28.
